mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM task
AND project_id = #{projectId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (name, project_id, project_name, assignee, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, actual_launch_date, status, priority) VALUES (#{name}, #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{assignee}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{actualLaunchDate}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'NOT_STARTED'), COALESCE(#{priority}, 'MEDIUM'))
